clusters.justification: These terms delineate global emotional and mood-related computations that share strong macro-scale co-activation across salience and limbic neurocircuitry.
This cluster captures the appraisal of subjective utility and goal-directed motivation routed primarily through striatal and ventromedial prefrontal pathways.
These terms share a functional dependence on the default mode architecture, reflecting internally generated, abstract representations regarding the self and interpersonal environments.
